## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing style (ES6+, strict mode, zero deps)
- [ ] No new external dependencies introduced
- [ ] Tested on 3+ different websites
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] API key never exposed to page context
- [ ] All user content HTML-escaped before DOM insertion
- [ ] i18n: translations provided for FR, EN, ES (if UI text added)
- [ ] Security: no inline event handlers, no `innerHTML` with unsanitized data
